note: This repo's design system is mirrored to the Claude Design project above so it can be edited in either Claude Code or claude.ai/design. To re-sync after editing build.mjs: run the build, then DesignSync finalize_plan({projectId, localDir:'<abs>/design-system', writes:['cards/**'], deletes:[]}) -> write_files(localPath per card). Cards are self-contained HTML with first-line @dsCard markers; Raleway fonts + the logo load from the deployed Vercel URLs (crow-song-yoga.vercel.app).
